prompt: Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department

inputData.question: Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Compare average exam scores vs project scores by department"},"startedAt":1771855789957,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to compare average exam scores vs project scores by department. I've confirmed the schema structure: grades table contains exam_score and project_score columns, enrollments links to course_sections, course_sections links to courses, and courses links to departments. I'll join these tables and group by department, calculating the average of exam_score and project_score for each department.","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score
FROM grades g
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name
","assumptions":["Exam scores and project scores are stored in the grades table as exam_score and project_score columns","Department information is linked through courses → departments","Enrollments link students to course sections which contain the course and department information","Null scores are excluded from the averages"]},"endedAt":1771855822215},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

data.department: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Exam Scores vs Project Scores by Department

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score
FROM grades g
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name

sample.department: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score,
  ROUND(AVG(g.project_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_project_score
FROM grades g
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL OR g.project_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY d.name
